title: Hexachlamys tapiraguaiensis
taxonomy: Hexachlamys tapiraguaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrtaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of South America. This plant belongs to the genus Hexachlamys, which is a part of the larger family Myrtaceae. The Myrtaceae family is a diverse group of plants commonly known as the myrtle family. This family includes over 6,000 species, many of which are economically important for their fruits, oils, and other products.
